What We Do

A complete platform.
One trusted partner.

Delofito operates across seven specialised disciplines — eliminating the fragmentation that slows projects and escalates risk.

Manpower Services

Vetted engineering and operations professionals deployed on-time, on-specification — from mechanical engineers to HSE specialists.

Learn More →

Marine Logistics & Chartering

Vessel chartering, cargo operations advisory, and full port coordination across West African and international waters.

Learn More →

Marine Assurance & Risk

Independent vessel vetting, risk assessments, incident investigation, and claims coordination for operators and insurers.

Learn More →

Fleet Optimisation Advisory

Data-driven fleet analysis to reduce voyage cost, improve utilisation, and build practical emissions compliance strategies.

Learn More →

Aviation Leasing & Brokerage

Aircraft and asset leasing advisory from ACMI and wet lease structures to dry lease origination, structuring, and placement.

Learn More →

Aviation Transaction Support

Technical due diligence, buy/sell advisory, pre-purchase inspections, and full transaction execution from LOI to delivery.

Learn More →

Aviation Technical & Compliance

NCAA regulatory advisory, airworthiness oversight, safety management systems, and asset transition management.

Learn More →
Aviation Operations
About Delofito

A Different Kind of
Energy Services Partner

Delofito Limited is a specialised technical and advisory firm operating across the marine, aviation, and energy sectors. We provide integrated services spanning manpower, logistics, asset management, risk assurance, and transactional advisory — with a particular depth of expertise in the Nigerian market.

We work with upstream and downstream energy companies, maritime operators, aviation asset owners, financial institutions, and infrastructure developers who require a partner with the capability to understand their business — not just respond to their purchase orders.

01

Discovery First

We begin by understanding the actual problem, not the surface request. The right questions protect your margins.

02

Precision Execution

Right expertise, right time. Clear accountability at every stage. Clients do not manage complexity on our behalf.

03

Long-Term Partnership

Our most valued relationships extend far beyond individual transactions. Most business challenges are continuous.

04

Nigeria + Global

Deep roots in Nigerian energy and maritime regulation, held to international standards on every engagement.

Request Engagement →

Energy · Maritime · Aviation · Infrastructure

Our Differentiators

Built for Complexity.
Trusted for Execution.

We combine deep sector knowledge with operational excellence to deliver results in the most demanding environments.

01

Integrated Capability

One relationship, not multiple vendors. Full accountability across marine and aviation disciplines simultaneously.

02

Nigeria Regulatory Depth

From NCAA compliance to NIMASA cabotage requirements — we navigate Nigeria’s regulatory environment daily to protect your operations.

03

Technical Practitioners

Every engagement is supported by professionals who have worked in the sectors they advise on. Operational experience, not desk research.

04

Rapid Deployment

Specialist manpower on-site within 72 hours or a vessel chartered at short notice — we deliver when operational timelines demand it.

05

Enterprise-Grade Rigour

Our processes and standards meet the expectations of international energy companies, financiers, and insurers without exception.

06

Discreet Advisory

Transactions and sensitive matters handled with the discretion executive clients require. We earn trust by protecting it.

Sectors We Serve

Built for industries where
precision is non-negotiable.

Delofito’s capabilities were built around the specific needs of high-stakes industries — where operational failure has real consequences.

Energy

Oil & Gas

Manpower, marine logistics, risk management, and advisory for upstream and downstream operations across Nigeria and West Africa.

Maritime

Maritime & Offshore

Logistical precision, regulatory knowledge, and technical assurance for OSV operators, shipping companies, and offshore contractors.

Aviation

Aviation

Leasing advisory, transaction support, and technical compliance for airlines, lessors, investors, and asset managers across Africa.

Infrastructure

Logistics & Infrastructure

Skilled manpower, coordinated marine logistics, and robust risk management for complex multi-stakeholder projects.

Track Record

Selected Experience

Evidence of capability, not claims of it — engagements that demonstrate how Delofito delivers in complex, high-stakes environments.

Marine Logistics

Vessel Chartering for Upstream Operations, Offshore Nigeria

Challenge
Emergency charter support required within 96 hours. Standard procurement channels had failed to identify a compliant, suitable vessel.
Outcome
Compliant vessel fixed and mobilised within the 96-hour window. Production operations proceeded without interruption. Operator retained Delofito on a framework basis.
Read Case Study →
Aviation Advisory

Dry Lease Structuring & NCAA Compliance for a Nigerian Operator

Challenge
Lessor’s lease terms contained redelivery conditions creating significant end-of-lease cost exposure, combined with complex NCAA certification requirements.
Outcome
Lease executed on materially improved terms. NCAA certification obtained within the operator’s target timeframe, enabling commercial operations to commence as planned.
Read Case Study →
Manpower

Rapid Deployment of Specialist Operations Personnel, Niger Delta

Challenge
Unplanned operational gap required BOSIET and OPITO-certified engineers and HSE specialists deployed within 72 hours.
Outcome
All positions filled and personnel deployed to the offshore installation within 72 hours of instruction. Zero compliance gaps on post-deployment audit.
Read Case Study →
